sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36633" key="e)cala/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξᾰλάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n36633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">migrate,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πανοικεσίᾳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
